response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with nearly two decades of shipping across web, mobile, and systems work, and his recent MCP code-generator and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq is genuinely relevant. However, the role's core requirement is 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and his hands-on AI experience spans roughly one year; there is no evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, evaluation pipelines, or Python, and no demonstrated enterprise customer-facing AI delivery at staff level. He reads as an excellent staff generalist, not a staff GenAI forward-deployed engineer.
strengths: Recent hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow infrastructure work at re:cinq
Deep TypeScript/Node.js production experience with strong testing and craftsmanship culture
Broad full-stack and systems range, including high-throughput low-latency services and AWS CDK
concerns: Only ~1 year of AI-related work versus the required 8+ years of production AI solutions
No evidence of vector databases, RAG, LLM evaluation pipelines, or Python
No demonstrated enterprise customer-facing technical discovery or forward-deployed consulting at staff level

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG/vector database and evaluation expertise
MCP/agentic tooling and strong engineering fundamentals
